title: Mayshlaps
description: This modpack is aimed on creating an enhanced Vanilla experience. Focusing on exploration and building with mods such as create and immersive aircraft. I will be constantly updating and tweaking the modpack to make it more and more fun! Enjoy!
body: This modpack is aimed on creating an enhanced Vanilla experience. Focusing on exploration and building with mods such as create and immersive aircraft. I will be constantly updating and tweaking the modpack to make it more and more fun! Enjoy!
